# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We aim to keep the latest major release of `@openfort/react-native` up to date with security-related patches.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.x.x   | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you identify a vulnerability in this library, please email security@openfort.xyz with:

- Description
- Suggested impact (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
- Minimal reproducible example
- Suggested fix (if known)

Please do **not** open a public GitHub issue for security-sensitive reports. We will acknowledge receipt within 72 hours and provide a timeline for remediation.
